citeAs: Gorgias — Shopify helpdesk sidebar, automation rules, revenue from support
facts: Native Shopify integration with sidebar on orders and customers
Competes on support automation and macro workflows, not greenfield builds
Pricing scales with ticket volume — wedge apps must avoid feature parity

citeAs: Recharge — subscriptions, selling plans, subscriber portal
facts: Dominant Shopify subscription billing and customer portal
Selling Plan APIs are the extension surface for subscription adjacents
Dunning and churn tools cluster around Recharge ecosystem

citeAs: Yotpo — reviews, loyalty, SMS bundle for DTC
facts: Suite player across reviews, loyalty, and retention marketing
Hard to displace on reviews alone; loyalty/referral modules overlap many theses
Enterprise upsell motion — long sales for full suite

citeAs: Klaviyo — email/SMS CDP tied to Shopify events
facts: Owns lifecycle messaging and segmentation for most scaling DTC brands
Flows triggered by Shopify webhooks — integration depth is table stakes
Competing on 'another email tool' is a trap; need a distinct job

citeAs: Loop — returns portal and exchange flows
facts: Standard for returns/exchanges on Shopify Plus and growth brands
Returnless refund and exchange upsell are crowded
POS and B2B returns are harder surfaces

citeAs: Privy — popups, email capture, basic automation
facts: Lightweight conversion popups and list growth
Often replaced when brands graduate to Klaviyo-heavy stacks
Migration and escape narratives are credible wedges

citeAs: Octane AI — quizzes and zero-party data in Shopify
facts: Quiz and recommendation flows on PDP and post-purchase
Checkout extension policies constrain where quizzes can run
Differentiation needs a narrower job than 'another quiz app'
Popular low-cost reviews app on Shopify App Store
Commodity feature set — trap to build 'better reviews' alone
Points-based loyalty with referral module
Overlaps Yotpo loyalty and standalone referral tools
Modern subscription portal competing with Recharge
Migration stories are high-touch but valid wedge
WISMO and shipment tracking standard for DTC
Narrow tracking wedge must beat bundled suite value

citeAs: Bold — legacy Shopify apps (bundles, subscriptions history)
facts: Historical player; many merchants on legacy Bold stacks
Migration and simplification wedges still resonate

citeAs: Shopify Plus — checkout extensibility and B2B
facts: Checkout UI extensions require Plus for many merchants
Functions and Checkout Extensibility are the modern surface
Claims of deep checkout mutation without Plus are often invalid
Social selling integrations compete with native Shopify channels
Attribution and catalog sync are integration-heavy

citeAs: Stripe — payments rails behind Shopify Payments
facts: Billing and payment method updates often go through Stripe APIs
Dunning adjacent tools must respect Shopify Payments constraints
